title: arthratherum hygrometricum
intro: Arthratherum hygrometricum, also known as the "cloud fern," is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are said to have potential health benefits. The cloud fern has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the cloud fern can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
